docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SFMUNICIPAL RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, WILLIAM H.
